# Giacom PDF Test Fixtures

Sanitized Giacom pre-billing and post-billing PDF fixtures for parser regression tests.

## Required Fixtures

| File | Validates |
|------|-----------|
| `pre-billing-sample-a.pdf` | Standard pre-billing extraction (FR-002, FR-005–FR-009) |
| `pre-billing-sample-b.pdf` | Pre-billing format variant (FR-012) |
| `post-billing-sample-a.pdf` | Standard post-billing extraction (FR-002, FR-027) |
| `post-billing-sample-b.pdf` | Post-billing format variant (FR-012) |
| `partial-success-sample.pdf` | Partial success with one corrupt line (FR-018, SC-003) |
| `encrypted-sample.pdf` | Encrypted PDF rejection |

Golden expected outputs live in `expected/*.json`.

## Commit Policy

- Production PDFs MUST be sanitized (no real customer PII) before commit.
- Synthetic fixtures generated by `SyntheticGiacomPdfBuilder` in the test project are safe to commit.
- Do not commit unsanitized production billing PDFs.

## Test-Only Column Calibration Sidecars

When header detection fails during fixture development, add a sidecar `*.columns.json` next to the PDF:

```json
{
  "productName": { "minX": 40, "maxX": 280 },
  "quantity": { "minX": 285, "maxX": 330 },
  "chargeType": { "minX": 335, "maxX": 400 },
  "period": { "minX": 405, "maxX": 500 },
  "lineCost": { "minX": 505, "maxX": 560 },
  "references": { "minX": 565, "maxX": 650 }
}
```

Sidecars are **test-only** overrides for regression debugging. Production parser uses header detection from `ColumnDetector`.
